inputs.label: Initial Mass (m0)
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of the vehicle including propellant before burn.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total mass of the vehicle including propellant before burn.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yanma öncesi aracın yakıt dahil toplam kütlesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtmasse des Fahrzeugs einschließlich Treibstoff vor dem Brennschluss.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse totale du véhicule, y compris le propergol, avant la combustion.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa total del vehículo incluyendo propelente antes de la combustión.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الكتلة الإجمالية للمركبة بما في ذلك الوقود قبل الاحتراق.

inputs.label: Final Mass (mf)
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the vehicle after propellant is expended.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the vehicle after propellant is expended.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des Fahrzeugs nach Verbrauch des Treibstoffs.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse du véhicule après consommation du propergol.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa del vehículo después de consumir el propelente.

inputs.label: Specific Impulse (Isp)
inputs.businessContext: Measure of engine efficiency, thrust per weight flow rate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measure of engine efficiency, thrust per weight flow rate.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Motor verimliliğinin ölçüsü, birim ağırlık debisi başına itki.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maß für die Triebwerkseffizienz, Schub pro Gewichtsstrom.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesure de l'efficacité du moteur, poussée par débit massique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Medida de eficiencia del motor, empuje por tasa de flujo de peso.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مقياس كفاءة المحرك، الدفع لكل معدل تدفق وزني.

inputs.label: Standard Gravity (g0)
inputs.businessContext: Acceleration due to gravity at sea level, used to convert specific impulse to exhaust velocity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Acceleration due to gravity at sea level, used to convert specific impulse to exhaust velocity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Deniz seviyesinde yerçekimi ivmesi, özgül itkiyi egzoz hızına dönüştürmek için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erdbeschleunigung auf Meereshöhe, zur Umrechnung von spezifischem Impuls in Ausströmgeschwindigkeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Accélération due à la gravité au niveau de la mer, utilisée pour convertir l'impulsion spécifique en vitesse d'éjection.
businessContext_i18n.es: Aceleración debida a la gravedad a nivel del mar, utilizada para convertir impulso específico en velocidad de escape.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تسارع الجاذبية عند مستوى سطح البحر، يستخدم لتحويل الدفع النوعي إلى سرعة العادم.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
